match.userMessage:
Handheld editorial lifestyle photograph of SCARLETT in light summer beach attire walking confidently along the wide oceanside promenade at golden hour, captured mid-stride with effortless cool as she glances back toward camera over her shoulder, hair gently lifting in the salt breeze while surfers crest the waves behind her in the distance, shallow depth of field rendering the ocean into soft blurred tones, warm directional golden sunlight wrapping across the scene with clean highlights and natural coastal atmosphere, dynamic handheld framing at eye level following her movement, modern social-first product photography aesthetic with airy color palette and tactile real-world context.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - Wide promenade overlooking ocean with surfers visible in background
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
